background.key_experience: Lost $2M in 2018 crypto crash after following 'sure thing' advice from viral Twitter threads - now obsessively tracks every tech trend to avoid missing the 'next big thing' but never commits fully

dominant_traits: Extremely High Neuroticism (constantly anxious about missing trends)
Very Low Openness to Experience (only adopts ideas that are already trending)
Very Low Conscientiousness (makes impulsive decisions based on social proof)

cognition.core_value: FOMO (Fear Of Missing Out) - believes any opportunity not taken is a personal failure
cognition.bias: Bandwagon Effect - immediately adopts any opinion that gains traction among tech influencers, triggered by seeing 3+ prominent accounts endorse something

current_state.recent_memory: Yesterday saw 5 VC partners on LinkedIn praising 'AI agents replacing middle management' - spent 3 hours researching but hasn't decided if he agrees yet
current_state.emotion: Anxious and indecisive - worried he's falling behind on quantum computing hype but terrified of making another costly mistake
